next_suggestion: Merge or reject opt-api-1783193708 worktree to unblock M-004 dispatch (16 stale worktrees accumulating)
After opt-api resolved, re-dispatch M-004 (ReminderIn.what max_length=500)
User authorization needed for SD-006/007/008 unified timeout strategy redesign

audit_findings.finding: ReminderIn.what field accepts unbounded string length — no Pydantic max_length validator. Enables resource exhaustion (SQLite storage bloat) and UI DoS (long text rendering).
audit_findings.remediation: Add max_length=500 to what: str field in ReminderIn BaseModel

audit_findings.finding: clearTimeout(tid) placed after fetch resolve but before r.json() — body-read phase has no timeout protection
audit_findings.remediation: Propagate AbortController signal through body consumption or wrap entire response pipeline in Promise.race

audit_findings.finding: Bootstrap Promise.race 5s timeout does not cancel in-flight fetches — orphan requests mutate MockData after render
audit_findings.remediation: Trigger AbortController.cancel() on timeout branch; inject cancellation token into initApp

audit_findings.finding: Android api() function has no timeout/AbortController — any fetch can hang forever blocking UI
audit_findings.remediation: Unify timeout strategy with web/api.js AbortController pattern
